data.label: Vital Event
data.description:
A single life event recorded in the Cordova vital statistics registry.
Business Context: Links to Civil Registry for person identification
Purpose: Common fields shared across all vital event types

items.label: Certificate Number
items.description: Unique certificate number for this vital record

items.label: City
items.description: One of the nine cities in the Republic of Cordova.

items.label: Province
items.description: One of the three provinces of the Republic of Cordova. Used across civil registry, property, tax, and all geographic records.

items.label: Registration Date
items.description: Date the business was officially registered in Cordova

items.label: Birth Record
items.description:
Details specific to birth certificates.
Business Context: Links newborn and parents to Civil Registry, physician to Healthcare
Purpose: Document a birth with parents, attending physician, and location
Parent Cluster: Vital Event

items.label: National ID (CID)
items.description: Cordova National Identity Number. Format: COR-PPCC-NNNNNN where PP is the two-letter province code (AL=Aldara, BR=Brevina, CE=Celara), CC is the two-digit city code (01-03), and NNNNNN is a six-digit sequence number. Issued at birth or naturalization. Required for all government transactions.

items.label: Person Full Name
items.description: A complete name of a person (NIEM nc:PersonFullName)

items.label: Sex
items.description: Biological sex assigned at birth based on physical characteristics. UMLS CUI: C0079399 (Biologic Sex). Aligned with OMB standards for reporting.

items.label: Death Record
items.description:
Details specific to death certificates.
Business Context: Links to Healthcare (certifying physician), enables public health statistics
Purpose: Document a death with cause, certifying physician, and circumstances
Parent Cluster: Vital Event

items.label: Cause of Death
items.description: Primary cause of death as determined by certifying physician

items.label: Place of Death
items.description: Type of location where death occurred

items.label: Divorce Record
items.description:
Details specific to divorce decrees.
Purpose: Document a divorce with both parties and court details
Parent Cluster: Vital Event

items.label: Marriage Certificate Number
items.description: Certificate number of the original marriage being dissolved

items.label: Decree Date
items.description: Date the divorce decree was issued by the court

items.label: Marriage Record
items.description:
Details specific to marriage certificates.
Business Context: Links both parties to Civil Registry identities
Purpose: Document a marriage with both parties, officiant, and witnesses
Parent Cluster: Vital Event

subject.label: Vital Record Subject
subject.description: Person who is the subject of a vital statistics record (birth, death, marriage, divorce). W3C PROV-DM Agent (Person) with Cordova CID.

provider.label: Vital Statistics Office
provider.description: Government office responsible for recording and certifying vital events (births, deaths, marriages, divorces). W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization).
